info.name: Kang Open Banking API v1
info.description: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec v4.17.3 on 2026-04-28. Canonical base URLs only — no internal Supabase URLs.

request.description: Reviewer-friendly snapshot of the API's live security posture: OAuth 2.0, OIDC, mTLS (FAPI 1.0 Advanced / RFC 8705), DCR (RFC 7591), PAR (RFC 9126), JAR (RFC 9101), PKCE (RFC 7636 — S256), webhook signing, JWKS rotation, and sandbox status. Returns 200 with cache-control public, max-age=60. No authentication required.
Returns 200 when the API is ready to accept traffic. Checks database connectivity.
Initiate OAuth 2.0 authorization flow with PKCE (FAPI 1.0 Advanced)

OAuth 2.0 Token Endpoint. Supports two client authentication modes: (1) Public clients using authorization_code + PKCE — no client authentication required, use an empty security context. (2) Confidential clients using mTLS (RFC 8705) — present the client certificate registered via /v1/certificates for certificate-bound access tokens required by FAPI 1.0 Advanced.  Supports mutual TLS (mTLS) client authentication per RFC 8705 for certificate-bound access tokens required by FAPI 1.0 Advanced.
Responses will conform to the StandardResponse envelope in a future minor release.
Responses will conform to the StandardResponse envelope in a future minor release.
Retrieve a paginated list of savings accounts for the authenticated user. Requires a valid AISP consent.
Trigger interest accrual across all eligible savings accounts. Designed for scheduled (cron) invocation.
Post a balanced double-entry journal entry. Sum of debits must equal sum of credits.
⚠️ DEPRECATED (sunset: 2026-01-01): Use the unified Payment Gateway at /v1/gateway/charges instead.  Responses will conform to the StandardResponse envelope in a future minor release.

item.name: Validate any account identifier (RIB, IBAN, LOCAL_BANK, MOMO)
List Cameroon banks with RIB structure and SWIFT codes

request.description: Register a WooCommerce store for Kang Open Banking payment processing. Returns API credentials.
Validates the plugin is correctly installed and API credentials are working.
Downloads the complete Woo for Kang WordPress plugin as a ZIP file ready for installation. Authentication required. A developer account or merchant account bearer token must be provided.
Initiates a payment for a WooCommerce order. Called by the WordPress plugin during checkout.
Retrieve transaction history for a WooCommerce merchant. Used by the plugin for transaction synchronization.
Receives payment status updates and updates the corresponding WooCommerce order.
